name: Unlimited Credit Repair
description_short: Unlimited Credit Repair is a credit repair provider based in Woodland Hills, California. Rated 4.6/5 with 220 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Unlimited Credit Repair is a credit repair provider serving clients in Woodland Hills, California. With 220 Google reviews and a 4.6/5.0 rating, Unlimited Credit Repair has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Unlimited Credit Repair specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Woodland Hills, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Unlimited Credit Repair operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Woodland Hills, California area who are considering Unlimited Credit Repair should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
